inputs.prompt:
A vertical 9:16 cinematic 3D animated scene inside a modest tier-3 Indian home decorated for a birthday. The room has faded painted walls, plastic purple and golden balloons, cheap "HAPPY BIRTHDAY BISO" paper banner, fairy lights, a small homemade birthday cake on a floral tablecloth, plastic gift boxes, an old wooden sofa with printed covers, and a slightly worn cement floor. Warm yellow tungsten lighting creates a cozy village-town atmosphere.

Biso is an anthropomorphic ₹20 Indian note female with the exact same cute Pixar-inspired face, expressive big eyes, and black printed salwar suit with beige dupatta and slippers from the reference. She stands near the birthday table, repeatedly glancing toward the front door with hopeful eyes, nervously clasping her hands and shifting her weight, clearly waiting for someone special.

Standing beside her is her best friend, an anthropomorphic ₹50 Indian note female wearing a simple green printed salwar kameez with matching dupatta and slippers, expressive and slightly mischievous. She folds one arm while talking casually, teasing Biso with playful expressions and hand gestures.

The wooden front door remains closed throughout the shot. Biso keeps looking toward it every few seconds with anticipation.

Dialogue (Hindi):

Biso (hopeful, looking at the door):
"आज मेरा बर्थडे है... और ये सौका अभी तक नहीं आया..."

₹50 Friend (smirking, teasing):
"अरे बीसो, छोड़ उसे... वो नहीं आएगा तो क्या? वैसे भी... बेचारा खुद पैसे नहीं कमा पाता। गिफ्ट क्या लाएगा?"

Biso doesn't respond immediately. She smiles nervously while continuing to stare at the door with hope, believing Souka will arrive. The camera slowly dollies toward them, ending on Biso's anxious face as warm birthday lights softly flicker in the background.

Style: Premium Pixar-inspired 3D animation, expressive facial acting, natural lip sync, subtle idle movements, cinematic warm lighting, emotional storytelling, consistent character design, shallow depth of field, smooth camera movement, 24fps, ultra-high quality, 9:16 vertical.

A vertical 9:16 cinematic 3D animated scene inside a modest Tier-3 Indian home decorated for a birthday. The room has faded painted walls, purple and golden balloons, a handmade "HAPPY BIRTHDAY BISO" banner, warm fairy lights, a small pink birthday cake on a floral tablecloth, plastic chairs, an old wooden sofa with printed covers, and a rustic wooden front door. The atmosphere feels authentic, middle-class, and emotionally warm.

Two anthropomorphic Indian currency-note characters stand beside the birthday table.

Biso is a cute ₹20 Indian note female with large expressive Pixar-style eyes, wearing a simple black printed salwar suit with a beige dupatta and black sandals. She looks repeatedly toward the closed front door with hopeful, slightly worried eyes, nervously holding her hands together.

Beside her stands her talkative best friend, a cheerful ₹50 Indian note female wearing a faded mint-green printed salwar kameez with matching dupatta and slippers. She is playful, expressive, and slightly sarcastic, using animated hand gestures while teasing Biso.

The camera begins as a medium two-shot with both characters in frame. Biso keeps glancing at the door while the ₹50 friend talks. The friend shrugs dramatically, folds her arms, then points toward the empty doorway while speaking. Biso looks disappointed for a moment, then suddenly raises one hand to stop her friend. She turns confidently toward her with a gentle smile and hopeful eyes, speaking with complete faith.

Dialogue (Natural Hindi Lip Sync):

Biso (looking at the door, softly):
"आज मेरा बर्थडे है... और ये सौका अभी तक नहीं आया।"

₹50 Friend (teasing, playful):
"अरे बीसो, छोड़ उसे... वो नहीं आएगा तो क्या? वैसे भी... बेचारा खुद पैसे नहीं कमा पाता। गिफ्ट क्या लाएगा?"

Biso (smiling with confidence):
"वो मुझसे बहुत प्यार करता है।"

Biso finishes her line while looking back toward the front door with a hopeful smile, convinced Souka will arrive any moment. The friend rolls her eyes with a faint amused smile. The shot ends with both characters looking toward the door as the fairy lights softly twinkle, creating anticipation for Souka's entrance.

Style: Premium Pixar-inspired 3D animation, expressive anthropomorphic Indian currency characters, consistent with previous character designs. Set inside a modest Tier-3 Indian home decorated for a birthday with faded walls, plastic purple and golden balloons, a handmade "HAPPY BIRTHDAY BISO" banner, warm yellow fairy lights, a floral tablecloth with a small homemade birthday cake, old wooden furniture, and a cozy middle-class atmosphere. Warm tungsten lighting, cinematic depth of field, natural facial animation, high-quality lip sync, smooth camera transitions.

SHOT 1 (0–3 sec)
Medium two-shot. Biso (₹20 note female) and her friend (₹50 note female) stand beside the birthday table. Biso keeps glancing toward the closed wooden front door every few moments, anxiously waiting. She softly says while looking at the door:

"आज मेरा बर्थडे है...
और ये सौका अभी तक नहीं आया।"

Her voice is hopeful but slightly disappointed.

SHOT 2 (3–9 sec)
Cut to an over-the-shoulder shot from behind Biso toward the ₹50 friend. The friend smiles teasingly, folds one arm, gestures casually with the other hand, and speaks with playful confidence:

"अरे बीसो, छोड़ उसे...
वो नहीं आएगा तो क्या?
वैसे भी...
बेचारा खुद पैसे नहीं कमा पाता।
गिफ्ट क्या लाएगा?"

As she speaks, cut between her expressive face and Biso's reaction. Biso lowers her eyes briefly, then looks back toward the door, still hopeful despite the teasing.

The friend pauses mid-gesture and looks at Biso.

SHOT 4 (11–15 sec)
Slow cinematic push-in to a tight close-up of Biso's face. She turns fully toward her friend while her eyes slowly become glossy with tears—not crying, just overwhelmed with love and hope. Her eyebrows lift gently, her lips form a warm emotional smile, and she makes adorable puppy eyes filled with unwavering trust.

She softly says:

"वो मुझसे बहुत प्यार करता है।"

Hold for one second after the dialogue. Biso keeps her emotional puppy-eye expression with a tiny hopeful smile, warm fairy lights softly glowing as beautiful circular bokeh behind her. The background gently falls out of focus, emphasizing her emotional expression.

Camera Style:
• Smooth cinematic cuts
• Natural eye-line matching
• Slow push-in during the emotional ending
• Shallow depth of field
• Expressive facial animation
• Subtle idle body movement
• Natural lip sync
• Premium emotional acting

Mood:
Heartwarming, innocent, emotional, hopeful, cute, relatable, grounded Tier-3 Indian middle-class birthday atmosphere.
